description:
Earn yield on WETH through KPK-curated fixed-rate ETH term markets, with borrow rates set monthly from a benchmark ETH staking rate, plus a complementary variable-rate allocation for withdrawal liquidity.

Withdrawals process when liquidity is available; most go through immediately, larger redemptions may need to wait until borrowers unwind at month-end. See the withdrawal mechanics on [docs.kpk.io](https://docs.kpk.io).

deprecationReason: Deprecated due to exposure to the insolvent positions held by Stream.
